answers.where: Miregate and Wispfen are visible on a stacked portrait map, with the Warden Journal directly below.
answers.action: Scout Road is now a full-width primary action row, with Rest and Upgrade clearly separated below it.
answers.response: Scout Road starts the first road encounter and changes the journal/combat state.
answers.reward: Main progress, XP/silver context, and the journal goal remain visible without dense desktop stat strings.
answers.game_look: The same generated slice9 panels and fantasy buttons compose into a readable mobile RPG screen instead of a squeezed desktop HUD.

next: Continue polish by simplifying the ornate mobile status strip and reducing map marker density in later regions.
